createWorkspace.title: Create Workspace
createWorkspace.name: Name
createWorkspace.limitReachedDesc: You have reached the maximum number of workspaces allowed for your plan.
createWorkspace.upgradeDesc: Upgrade your plan to create more workspaces and unlock additional features.

passwordModal.description: Set up a password to protect your workspace. Only people with the password can join.

workspaceHub.title: Workspace Hub
workspaceHub.description: Manage all your workspaces from this central hub

searchTab.title: Search workspace by code
searchTab.enterCode: Enter a workspace code to search

dashboardWorkspace.codeHelp: Use it to share with your friends to join the workspace

prompts.enterNewOwnerId: Please enter the user ID of the new owner to transfer ownership:
prompts.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this workspace? This action cannot be undone.

inviteMembers.title: Invite Friends to Workspace
inviteMembers.description: Select friends to invite to this workspace
inviteMembers.error: Failed to invite friends. Please try again.

toasts.invitationNotFound: Invitation not found or missing request ID
toasts.unbanAndKickSuccess: User has been unbanned and removed from workspace
toasts.unbanAndRestoreSuccess: User has been unbanned and restored
toasts.ownerLeaveRequiresNewOwner: Workspace owner must specify a new owner before leaving

memberModal.demoteDescription: Remove admin privileges from this member
memberModal.permissionsDescription: Configure what this member can do in the workspace
memberModal.roomAccessDescription: Manage this member's access to workspace rooms
memberModal.noteAccessDescription: Manage this member's access to workspace notes
memberModal.confirmRemove: Are you sure you want to remove this member?
memberModal.confirmBan: Are you sure you want to ban this user?
memberModal.ownerNoticeDescription: This user is the workspace owner and cannot be modified.
memberModal.noPermissionDescription: You don't have permission to manage this member.
memberModal.yourProfileDescription: This is your own member profile. You cannot modify your own permissions or role.

permissions.manageMembersDesc: Allow banning, unbanning, and changing member roles
permissions.acceptMemberDesc: Allow approving or rejecting join requests
permissions.managePermissionsDesc: Allow granting and revoking permissions for other members (owner only can grant this permission)
permissions.ownerOnlyPermission: Only the workspace owner can grant this permission
permissions.roomPermissionDesc: Toggle between room admin and room user access
permissions.notePermissionDesc: Toggle between note admin and note user access

workspaceGuard.invalidWorkspaceOrUser: Invalid workspace or user not authenticated
workspaceGuard.noAccess: You do not have access to this workspace
workspaceGuard.checkingPermissions: Checking your permissions for this workspace...
workspaceGuard.redirectMessage: You will be redirected to workspace list in a moment...

memberView.title: Workspace Member
memberView.description: You are currently a member of this workspace. You can view basic workspace information but don't have access to member management features.
memberView.contactAdmin: Contact an admin or the workspace owner if you need additional permissions.
memberView.viewOnlyNotice: You can view the member list but cannot perform any actions. Contact an admin if you need management permissions.

notifications.youWereBanned: You have been banned from this workspace
notifications.youWereRemoved: You have been removed from this workspace
notifications.roleChanged: Your role has been changed from {{oldRole}} to {{newRole}}
notifications.permissionsChanged: Your workspace permissions have been updated

collaborativeFocus.title: Collaborate on Focus
collaborativeFocus.subtitle: Focus together and achieve goals
collaborativeFocus.noSessionsDescription: Create the first focus session to work together effectively
collaborativeFocus.noHistoryDescription: Complete your first focus session to see history
collaborativeFocus.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this focus session?
